markdownRemark.html:
Hierplane

nice looking, blocks, not trees, strange json for input, React

  • https://github.com/allenai/hierplane
  • http://nlpviz.bpodgursky.com/

d3

  • https://github.com/d3/d3
  • https://github.com/d3/d3-hierarchy/blob/master/README.md#tree
  • https://bpodgursky.com/2013/08/19/using-corenlp-d3-js-and-dagre-js-to-visualize-sentence-parse-trees/ d3 for trees, input converted from CoreNLP lisp lists
  • https://github.com/christos-c/tree-viewer http://christos-c.com/treeviewer/# input from CoreNLP, but style is not great and not much functionality

AST

also d3, custom input

  • https://javascriptstore.com/2017/10/15/visualize-ast-javascript/
  • https://github.com/viswesh/astVisualizer
  • https://viswesh.github.io/astVisualizer/
